title: Order No. 48 of 2022 Regarding the Rights of Data Subjects
summary: Defines operational rules for access, objection, consent withdrawal, automated decision-making protections, controller responses, and the practical handling of requests by data subjects.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Details procedures for exercising data subject rights.

notes: Related instruments: Amended by Decision No. 80 of 2025
